title: DiagnosticProbeResult
description: One command/probe execution record within a DiagnosticBundle. Mirrors sysdiagnose-style ledgers (exit, elapsed, timeout, max RSS) and binds the row to any captured stdout/stderr artifacts.

name.description: Stable probe identifier within the bundle (e.g. uptime, rpm_ostree_status).

command.description: The exact shell command executed (after any templating).

exit.description: Process exit code (or timeout/kill code if the runner preserves it).

elapsedSeconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the probe run.

timeoutSeconds.description: Runner-enforced timeout seconds for this probe.

maxRssKb.description: Maximum resident set size in KB measured for the probe process.

risk.description: Risk classification for the probe output. High-risk probes are opt-in by policy.

stdoutPath.description: Relative path (inside the bundle) to captured stdout, if any.

stderrPath.description: Relative path (inside the bundle) to captured stderr, if any.

metaPath.description: Relative path (inside the bundle) to runner metadata (e.g. GNU time output), if any.
